scripts.lint: uv run stylebook . && pnpm exec stylebook .
scripts.documentation: uv run pdoc -o build/pdoc/ stylebook/ && typedoc --entryPointStrategy packages --out build/typedoc/ stylebook/
scripts.prepublish-website: pnpm documentation && rm -rf website/docs/api/ && mkdir -p website/docs/api/ && mv build/pdoc website/docs/api/pydoc/ && mv build/typedoc website/docs/api/tsdoc/
scripts.publish-website: scripts/prepare_mkdocs.sh && cd website && uv run mkdocs gh-deploy
scripts.preview-website: scripts/prepare_mkdocs.sh && cd website && uv run mkdocs serve --livereload
